descs: Flat square
Fold in half vertically
Unfold.
Fold in half horizontally
Unfold.
Fold bottom left corner to the top right.
Unfold.
Fold bottom right corner to the top left.
Unfold.
Collapse into a square base.
Fold the front two flaps to the midpoint, with the opening on the bottom.
Fold the back two flaps to the midpoint, with the opening on the bottom.
Fold the top corner down to create a crease.
Fold the top corner around the other direction to strengthen creases.
Unfold top corner.
Unfold all four flaps.
"Petal Fold" the front side, expanding it out into a diamond.
"Petal Fold" the other side, expanding it out into a diamond.
Fold the sides on the front two flaps to the midline.
Fold the sides on the back two flaps to the midline.
Fold the right side up at an arbitrary angle to form a crease, then collapse it [NOT SHOWN].
Fold the left side up at an arbitrary angle to form a crease, then collapse it [NOT SHOWN].
Make a crease for the head at an arbitrary angle.
Fold the backside wing down.
Fold the frontside wing down.
